title: grammitis leysii
intro: Grammitis leysii, also known as Leys' Grammitis, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Grammitis leysii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Grammitis leysii can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
